commands.unpublish.notPublished.zh_cn: 目前尚未开放多人游戏

death.attack.sulfurCubeHot.zh_cn: %1$s发现了不只有地板是熔岩做的

death.attack.sulfurCubeHot.player.en_us: %2$s showed %1$s that not just the floor is lava
death.attack.sulfurCubeHot.player.zh_cn: %2$s让%1$s知道了不只有地板是熔岩做的

editGamerule.inGame.disabled.hardcore.to.en_us: Cannot change game rules in a hardcore world.
editGamerule.inGame.disabled.hardcore.to.zh_cn: 无法在极限模式世界中更改游戏规则。

gui.friends.confirm_unfriend.en_us: Are you sure you want to remove this player from your Friends List?
gui.friends.confirm_unfriend.zh_cn: 你确定要将该玩家从好友列表中移除吗？

gui.friends.empty_nickname.en_us: Enter a valid profile name before sending a friend request
gui.friends.empty_nickname.zh_cn: 发送好友请求前，请输入有效的玩家档案名称

gui.friends.empty_state.en_us:
Friends you add will be listed here.

Manage online safety with your %s.
gui.friends.empty_state.zh_cn:
你添加的好友会在此处列出。

使用你的%s管理在线安全。

gui.friends.error.connection_issue.en_us:
Friends List is not working right now.

Check your internet connection and try again.
gui.friends.error.connection_issue.zh_cn:
好友列表目前无法使用。

请检查网络连接后再试。

gui.friends.error.failed.message.en_us: Unable to send your friend request right now
gui.friends.error.failed.message.zh_cn: 暂时无法发送好友请求

gui.friends.error.forbidden.message.en_us: Failed to perform this friend action. It may be due to the account's privacy settings.
gui.friends.error.forbidden.message.zh_cn: 无法执行此好友操作。这可能是账户的隐私设置导致的。

gui.friends.error.generic.en_us:
Something's wrong — with this feature, not your friends!

Try again later.
gui.friends.error.generic.zh_cn:
出了些问题——当然是说功能本身，好友们当然好着呢。

请稍后再试。

gui.friends.error.rateLimited.message.en_us: You're performing Friends List actions too quickly. Please wait a moment and try again.
gui.friends.error.rateLimited.message.zh_cn: 执行好友列表操作过快。请稍等片刻再试。

gui.friends.error.temporary_unavailable.en_us:
Friends List is not working right now.

Try again later.
gui.friends.error.temporary_unavailable.zh_cn:
好友列表目前无法使用。

请稍后再试。

gui.friends.error.unauthorized.en_us: Invalid token supplied. Restart your game and launcher, then try again
gui.friends.error.unauthorized.zh_cn: 提供的令牌无效。请重启游戏及启动器并重试

gui.friends.error.unavailable.message.en_us: The Friends List service is currently unavailable. Please check your connection and try again later.
gui.friends.error.unavailable.message.zh_cn: 好友列表服务当前不可用。请检查你的网络连接，稍后重试。

gui.friends.error.upgrade_needed.en_us: Update the game to access your Friends List.
gui.friends.error.upgrade_needed.zh_cn: 请更新游戏以访问好友列表。

gui.friends.error.user_may_lack_active_p.en_us: There is no player with this profile name
gui.friends.error.user_may_lack_active_p.zh_cn: 没有找到使用该档案名称的玩家

gui.friends.manage_account_footer.zh_cn: 使用你的%s管理在线安全

gui.friends.my_profile_name.narration.zh_cn: 将玩家档案名称%s复制到剪贴板

gui.friends.narration.button.accept.en_us: Press enter to accept friend request from %s
gui.friends.narration.button.accept.zh_cn: 按下Enter接受来自%s的好友请求

gui.friends.narration.button.cancel_requ.en_us: Press enter to cancel friend request to %s
gui.friends.narration.button.cancel_requ.zh_cn: 按下Enter取消发给%s的好友请求

gui.friends.narration.button.decline.en_us: Press enter to decline friend request from %s
gui.friends.narration.button.decline.zh_cn: 按下Enter拒绝来自%s的好友请求

gui.friends.narration.button.unfriend.en_us: Press enter to remove %s from Friends List
gui.friends.narration.button.unfriend.zh_cn: 按下Enter从好友列表中移除%s

gui.friends.pending.empty.zh_cn: 没有待处理的好友请求

gui.friends.toast.friend_invited.message.en_us: %s has been invited to join your world.

gui.friends.toast.friend_removed.message.en_us: %s has been removed from your friends list
gui.friends.toast.friend_removed.message.zh_cn: 已将%s从你的好友列表中移除

gui.friends.toast.generic_error.en_us: An unexpected error occurred while updating your Friends List. Please try again later.
gui.friends.toast.generic_error.zh_cn: 更新好友列表时出现意外错误。请稍后再试。

gui.friends.toast.host_invite_expired.me.en_us: Invitation to %s to join this world has expired.
gui.friends.toast.host_invite_expired.me.zh_cn: 发给%s加入此世界的邀请已过期。

gui.friends.toast.invite_from_friend.mes.en_us: %s invited you to join their world. Open the friends list by pressing "%s" to join
gui.friends.toast.invite_from_friend.mes.zh_cn: %s邀请你加入世界。请按“%s”键打开好友列表来加入

gui.friends.toast.join_invite_expired.me.en_us: Invitation to join %s's world has expired.
gui.friends.toast.join_invite_expired.me.zh_cn: 加入%s世界的邀请已过期。

gui.friends.toast.join_request.message.en_us: %s wants to join your world. Open the Friends list with "%s" or from the game menu.
gui.friends.toast.join_request.message.zh_cn: %s想要加入你的世界。按下“%s”或通过游戏菜单打开好友列表。

gui.friends.toast.requests_accepted_mult.zh_cn: %s位好友接受了你的好友请求

gui.friends.validation.already_friend.en_us: %s is already on your Friends List

gui.friends.validation.already_incoming.en_us: %s has already sent you a friend request

gui.friends.validation.already_outgoing.en_us: You've already sent a friend request to %s
gui.friends.validation.already_outgoing.zh_cn: 你已经向%s发送过好友请求

gui.friends.validation.cannot_add_self.en_us: You cannot send a friend request to yourself
gui.friends.validation.cannot_add_self.zh_cn: 你无法向自己发送好友请求

gui.privacy_link.message.en_us: Open this link to manage your privacy and online safety settings.
gui.privacy_link.message.zh_cn: 打开此链接来管理隐私和在线安全设置。

gui.privacy_link.title.en_us:
Changes to Xbox settings may take some time to apply.

If they don't update, restart the game.
gui.privacy_link.title.zh_cn:
更改Xbox设置可能需要一些时间才能生效。

如果这些设置没有及时更新，请重启游戏。

menu.multiplayerOptions.network.lan.tool.en_us: Players on the same network can join.
menu.multiplayerOptions.network.lan.tool.zh_cn: 处于同一网络上的玩家可加入。

menu.multiplayerOptions.publish.started..en_us: This world is now open to LAN. The port number is %s
menu.multiplayerOptions.publish.started..zh_cn: 此世界现已对局域网开放。端口号为%s

menu.multiplayerOptions.publish.started..en_us: This world is now open to Online multiplayer.
menu.multiplayerOptions.publish.started..zh_cn: 此世界现已对在线多人游戏开放。

menu.multiplayerOptions.publish.stopped.en_us: This world is no longer open to multiplayer
menu.multiplayerOptions.publish.stopped.zh_cn: 此世界不再对多人游戏开放

menu.playerReporting.no_players.en_us: There are no players to report in this world
menu.playerReporting.no_players.zh_cn: 此世界中没有玩家可以举报

narration.link.usage.focused.en_us: Press Enter to follow the link

narration.link.usage.hovered.en_us: Left click to follow the link
narration.link.usage.hovered.zh_cn: 单击鼠标左键打开链接

options.allowFriendRequests.tooltip.en_us: Allow other players to send you friend requests
options.allowFriendRequests.tooltip.zh_cn: 允许其他玩家向你发送好友请求

options.exclusiveFullscreen.off.tooltip.en_us: All input methods are expected to work in this fullscreen mode, but adaptive sync (Nvidia G-Sync, AMD FreeSync) will not work.
options.exclusiveFullscreen.off.tooltip.zh_cn: 在此全屏模式下，所有输入法都应当能正常使用，但自适应同步（Nvidia G-Sync、AMD FreeSync）将无法使用。

options.exclusiveFullscreen.on.tooltip.en_us: This fullscreen mode might prevent some input methods from working, but adaptive sync (Nvidia G-Sync, AMD FreeSync) should work.
options.exclusiveFullscreen.on.tooltip.zh_cn: 在此全屏模式下，部分输入法可能无法使用，但自适应同步（Nvidia G-Sync、AMD FreeSync）应当能正常使用。

options.friendsList.confirm.message.en_us:
Use your Friends List to send and receive friend requests.

Manage online safety settings with your %s.
options.friendsList.confirm.message.zh_cn:
使用“好友列表”发送和接收好友请求。

使用你的%s管理在线安全设置。

options.graphicsApi.restart.en_us: You must restart your game to change the graphics API.
options.graphicsApi.restart.zh_cn: 必须重启游戏才能更改图形API。

options.graphicsApi.tooltip.en_us: Which graphics API to use for rendering. Leave as Default unless you have a specific need to change this!
options.graphicsApi.tooltip.zh_cn: 选择渲染使用的图形API。除非有特殊需求需要更改，否则请维持此设置为默认不变！

options.graphicsApi.tooltip.vulkan.en_us: Experimental. Might reduce performance or cause instability on some systems.
options.graphicsApi.tooltip.vulkan.zh_cn: 实验性设置。在部分系统上使用可能会降低性能或导致不稳定。

options.inGameNotification.tooltip.zh_cn: 在游戏内显示好友通知

options.restartRequired.en_us: Some of your changes require a game restart to be applied.
options.restartRequired.zh_cn: 部分更改需要重启游戏才能生效。

options.sharePresence.all.tooltip.en_us: Friends can see what you're playing.
options.sharePresence.all.tooltip.zh_cn: 向好友显示你的游戏活动。

options.sharePresence.limited.tooltip.en_us: Friends can see when you're online, but not what you're playing.
options.sharePresence.limited.tooltip.zh_cn: 向好友显示在线状态，但不显示你的游戏活动。

options.sharePresence.none.tooltip.en_us: Friends will always see you as offline.
options.sharePresence.none.tooltip.zh_cn: 始终向好友显示离线状态。

options.worldOptions.allow_commands.disa.en_us: Cannot allow commands in a hardcore world.
options.worldOptions.allow_commands.disa.zh_cn: 无法在极限模式世界中开启允许命令。

options.worldOptions.game_mode.disabled..en_us: Changing the game mode requires operator permissions.
options.worldOptions.game_mode.disabled..zh_cn: 更改游戏模式需要管理员权限。

options.worldOptions.game_mode.disabled..en_us: Cannot change the game mode in a hardcore world.
options.worldOptions.game_mode.disabled..zh_cn: 无法在极限模式世界中更改游戏模式。

subtitles.entity.small_sulfur_cube.eat.en_us: Small Sulfur Cube puts on mass

telemetry.event.graphics_capabilities.de.en_us: This event informs us of the capabilities of the graphics device used to play the game.
telemetry.event.graphics_capabilities.de.zh_cn: 此事件告知我们运行游戏所使用的图形设备的功能信息。

telemetry.event.p2p_connection.descripti.en_us: This event helps us understand the reliability and performance of peer-to-peer connections between players. It records whether the connection was successful, the type of Interactive Connectivity Establishment (ICE, the protocol we use to establish peer-to-peer connections) candidate used, and how long it took to establish the connection.
telemetry.event.p2p_connection.descripti.zh_cn: 此事件有助于我们了解玩家之间点对点连接的可靠性和性能情况。事件将记录连接是否成功、所使用的交互式连接建立（ICE，即我们用于建立点对点连接的协议）候选类型，以及建立连接所花费的时间。

telemetry.property.backend_failure_missi.zh_cn: 后端创建失败缺失功能

telemetry.property.p2p_connection_ice_co.zh_cn: 交互式连接建立（ICE）连接时间（毫秒）

test.error.value_not_in_between.en_us: Expected %s to be in between %s and %s: was %s
test.error.value_not_in_between.zh_cn: 属性%s应在%s和%s之间：实际为%s

advancements.story.enter_the_nether.desc.en_us: Build, light, and enter a Nether Portal
advancements.story.enter_the_nether.desc.zh_cn: 建造、激活并进入一座下界传送门

build.tooHigh.en_us: The height limit for building is %s

build.tooLow.en_us: The minimum height for building is %s

command.failed.en_us: An unexpected error occurred while trying to execute that command
command.failed.zh_cn: 试图执行该命令时出现意外错误

commands.data.block.modified.zh_cn: 已修改位于%s, %s, %s的方块数据

commands.item.entity.set.success.multipl.en_us: Replaced a slot on %s entities with %s
commands.item.entity.set.success.multipl.zh_cn: 已用%2$s替换%1$s个实体的槽位

commands.locate.biome.not_found.en_us: Could not find a biome of type "%s" within a reasonable distance
commands.locate.biome.not_found.zh_cn: 无法在合理距离内找到类型为“%s”的生物群系

commands.locate.poi.not_found.en_us: Could not find a point of interest of type "%s" within a reasonable distance
commands.locate.poi.not_found.zh_cn: 在合理距离内找不到类型为“%s”的兴趣点

commands.place.template.invalid.en_us: There is no template with ID "%s"

commands.profile_fetch.id.failure.en_us: Failed to resolve profile for ID %s
commands.profile_fetch.id.failure.zh_cn: 无法解析ID为%s的玩家档案

commands.random.error.range_too_large.en_us: The range of the random value must be at most 2147483646

commands.random.error.range_too_small.en_us: The range of the random value must be at least 2

commands.schedule.cleared.success.zh_cn: 已移除%s个ID为%s的时间安排

datapackFailure.title.en_us:
Errors in the currently selected data pack(s) prevented the world from loading.
You can either try to load it with only the vanilla data pack ("Safe Mode"), or go back to the title screen and fix it manually.
datapackFailure.title.zh_cn:
当前选中的数据包中出现了错误，导致世界无法加载。
你可以尝试仅加载原版数据包（“安全模式”）或回到标题屏幕手动修复该问题。

gamerule.lavaSourceConversion.descriptio.en_us: When flowing lava is surrounded on two sides by lava sources, it converts into a source.
gamerule.lavaSourceConversion.descriptio.zh_cn: 相邻两面方块为熔岩源的流动熔岩会转化为熔岩源。

gamerule.playersNetherPortalCreativeDela.en_us: Player's Nether Portal delay in creative mode
gamerule.playersNetherPortalCreativeDela.zh_cn: 创造模式下玩家在下界传送门中等待的时间

gamerule.playersNetherPortalCreativeDela.en_us: Time (in ticks) that a creative mode player needs to stand in a Nether Portal before changing dimensions.
gamerule.playersNetherPortalCreativeDela.zh_cn: 创造模式下的玩家通过下界传送门前往其他维度前需要站在其中等待的时间（以刻为单位）。

gamerule.playersNetherPortalDefaultDelay.en_us: Player's Nether Portal delay in non-creative mode
gamerule.playersNetherPortalDefaultDelay.zh_cn: 非创造模式下玩家在下界传送门中等待的时间

gamerule.playersNetherPortalDefaultDelay.en_us: Time (in ticks) that a non-creative mode player needs to stand in a Nether Portal before changing dimensions.
gamerule.playersNetherPortalDefaultDelay.zh_cn: 非创造模式下的玩家通过下界传送门前往其他维度前需要站在其中等待的时间（以刻为单位）。

gamerule.waterSourceConversion.descripti.en_us: When flowing water is surrounded on two sides by water sources, it converts into a source.
gamerule.waterSourceConversion.descripti.zh_cn: 相邻两面方块为水源的流动水会转化为水源。

mco.configure.world.leave.question.line1.en_us: If you leave this Realm, you won't see it unless you are invited again
mco.configure.world.leave.question.line1.zh_cn: 离开该Realm后，除非再次收到邀请，否则其不会再显示

mco.configure.world.restore.download.que.en_us: The world will be downloaded and added to your singleplayer worlds.
mco.configure.world.restore.download.que.zh_cn: 世界将会被下载并添加至你的单人游戏世界中。

mco.selectServer.popup.en_us: Realms is a safe, simple way to enjoy an online Minecraft world with up to ten friends at a time. It supports loads of minigames and plenty of custom worlds! Only the owner of the Realm needs to pay.
mco.selectServer.popup.zh_cn: Realms是一种安全、简单地享受在线Minecraft世界的方式，可支持多达十位好友同时在线。它也支持多种小游戏与海量自定义世界！只有Realm的所有者需要付款。

options.allowServerListing.tooltip.en_us:
Servers may list online players as part of their public status.
With this option off, your name will not show up in such lists.
options.allowServerListing.tooltip.zh_cn:
服务器可能会公开列出目前在线的玩家。
若关闭此选项，你的名字将不会显示在此列表中。

options.directionalAudio.on.tooltip.en_us: Uses HRTF-based directional audio to improve the simulation of 3D sound. Requires HRTF-compatible audio hardware, and is best experienced with headphones.
options.directionalAudio.on.tooltip.zh_cn: 通过基于HRTF算法的定向环绕音频来改善立体音效的模拟。需使用与HRTF兼容的音频硬件，推荐在使用时佩戴耳机。

options.improvedTransparency.tooltip.en_us:
An experimental approach that uses screen shaders for drawing weather, clouds, and particles behind translucent blocks and water.
This will impact GPU performance.
options.improvedTransparency.tooltip.zh_cn:
实验性方案，使用顺序无关透明算法，以避免透视多层半透明物体时常见的图形问题。
此设置会影响性能。

options.needsRestart.en_us: Requires a game restart to take effect.
options.needsRestart.zh_cn: 需要重启游戏才能生效。

options.screenEffectScale.tooltip.en_us:
Strength of Nausea and Nether Portal screen distortion effects.
At lower values, the Nausea effect is replaced with a green overlay.
options.screenEffectScale.tooltip.zh_cn:
反胃状态效果和下界传送门所使用的屏幕扭曲效果的强度。
值较低时，反胃的扭曲效果会被一层绿色的视觉效果替代。

options.textureFiltering.anisotropic.too.en_us: A hardware-based filtering method, but impacts performance and significantly impacts video memory usage. May not be supported on all hardware.
options.textureFiltering.anisotropic.too.zh_cn: 基于硬件的过滤方法，但会影响性能，并大幅增加显存占用。可能不支持所有硬件。

options.textureFiltering.rgss.tooltip.en_us:
(Rotated Grid Super Sampling)
A shader-based filtering method that improves texture quality with a moderate performance impact.
options.textureFiltering.rgss.tooltip.zh_cn:
（旋转网格超采样）
基于着色器的过滤方法，可在适度性能影响下提高纹理品质。

restrictions_screen.permission.receive_s.en_us: You can receive system messages from the server
restrictions_screen.permission.receive_s.zh_cn: 你可以收到来自服务器的系统消息

restrictions_screen.permission.receive_s.en_us: You can't receive system messages from the server
restrictions_screen.permission.receive_s.zh_cn: 你无法收到来自服务器的系统消息
